node.text: Throwing it back to our rock era as we celebrate our 48th birthday 🤘

node.text: We empower students and creatives at @junkkouture to learn more about how STEAM is essential in designing a better, healthier world. Upcycled designs like “Gaia,” inspired by the goddess of Earth in Greek mythology, use flowers, leaves, and twine.

node.text:
Paper or plastic? The insulated cups provided on most Microsoft campuses are made from paper with a water-resistant coating made from corn starch, a renewable resource, and the clear cups are made from food grade ✨ compostable ✨ cups. 

#Microsoft #MicrosoftLife #ASMR #Coffee

Description: Hot and iced coffee being made in paper and compostable cups with Microsoft logos.

node.text:
My productivity (and my ability to tease Hannah) has seen a huge increase lately thanks to Microsoft’s Adaptive Accessories! #MicrosoftPartner ​⁣
​⁣
#MicrosoftAdaptiveAccessories are an ecosystem of customizable devices that elevate function for disabled individuals like yours truly. The Adaptive Mouse is super lightweight and easy to use (so much so that I find myself mindlessly scrolling it around just because it feels good). And with the Adaptive Hub and Adaptive Button options, I can personalize the inputs and commands that best fit my workflow. ​⁣
⁣
Take your productivity to the next level with technology that adapts to you! Link in my bio to learn more! ​⁣
⁣
#ProductivityForAll @microsoft

node.text:
We got our hands on the new Microsoft Adaptive Accessories, and we are blown away by the possibilities this line has to offer! There’s a saying that “One size fits all”, but with Microsoft Adaptive Accessories, “One size fits one”. You can use these accessories to create your own setup that is unique to you! With these accessories, Brad can perform various actions on his PC by clicking his head switches! 

Learn more about Microsoft Adaptive Accessories by clicking the link in our bio

#MicrosoftAdaptiveAccessories #ProductivityForAll #Microsoft #MicrosoftPartner #AllAccessLife #Accessibility #AssistiveTechnology

POV: You’re living your best #MicrosoftLife in Seoul.

There's snow place like home. ❄️

node.text: When it comes to taking steps to reduce waste, the juice is always worth the squeeze. Just ask Margaret! 🍊

Photo dump of the pure joy from our “Black Panther: Wakanda Forever” screenings. We love when shared moments, like a movie with family and friends, can also inspire the next generation of dreamers and innovators.

Thank you to everyone in Los Angeles, CA, Detroit, MI, Raleigh, NC, Newark, NJ and Waterloo, IA who came out to enjoy the film with us.

node.text: When we come together to transform ideas into reality, magic happens — and it starts with you. Shuri, played by Letitia Wright, in Marvel Studios’ Black Panther: #WakandaForever, encourages all of us to keep learning, practicing, and creating. Now in theaters.

node.text:
Haunted or not haunted?

#Microsoft #MicrosoftLife #👻

Description: POV exploring the Microsoft Archives in the dark with a flashlight, featuring various older moving and glowing products.
The passion to shape the future runs deep for NBA player @spidadmitchell. So together, we outfitted the Children’s Village in Dobbs Ferry, NY with new tech and an entire STEM curriculum.
Trick-or-treat. Drop a 🎃 in our replies just because.

node.text:
If you don’t already know, I am a huge History nerd and even got my degree in it at King’s. ⁣
⁣
I firmly believe that to understand where we are today and to move towards a better future we have to have a firm grasp of the past and the events that led us to where we are, and who we are, today. ⁣
⁣
So, when @microsoft asked me to experience the ‘Ancient Olympia: Common Grounds’ exhibition at the Athens Olympic Museum, I couldn’t say no, and truly had the most amazing time! ⁣
⁣
I remember watching Kelly Holmes and the men’s 4x100m at the Athens Games in 2004 and it was at that moment I knew that I wanted to compete in the games - to be part of that community and legacy of sporting excellence that started thousands of years ago. ⁣
⁣
Putting on the Microsoft HoloLens 2 instantly immersed me into Ancient Olympia where it stood 2,000 years ago 🤯 The mixed reality technology brought to life the ancient running track (which looked very long - deffo like over 200m in a straight line 😮‍💨 - would not have been amused if that was my discipline lol), the Statue of Zeus, and I even got to hold some of the structures in the palm of my hand! ⁣
⁣
It was amazing to have been transported to the ancient origins of the modern Games; a UNESCO world heritage site 🥹⁣
⁣
My 8 year old self loved it, the History nerd in me loved it, and of course as a professional athlete and medalist, I felt so very connected to the roots of what we do and our place in History. Grateful for an incredible experience that meant so much to me ❤️ #microsoftpartner

Don’t circle back on your snack break, take it now! OREO is teaming up with Microsoft to loop everybody into the snack breaks they need. 
 
Visit https://www.oreo.com/thinvite to sign up for THINVITE, a 15-minute calendar hold, perfect for anyone looking to press paws on a stressful workday 💻✉️ Order your limited-edition OREO THINS Snack Break Expansion Cookie Pack (while supplies last ‼️), featuring snack-size packs and tips from your favorite virtual assistant for when that mid-day slump hits 😉
POV: Procrastinating when the mid-day slump hits 📎 Block off your calendar at 10 am ET tomorrow for a special announcement 👀
Tap the ❤️ if you also love this rendition of the logo.

On top of the Microsoft Silicon Valley campus sits a 3-acre “living” roof. It was created to help expand various biological habitats into the workplace, with careful consideration of native and adapted plant species to encourage biodiversity of wildlife. 🌿🌱
Like this post if it’s happened to you.
The controller of a generation.

node.text:
Remote or in-office? Wherever you take your cup, we support you. ☕

#FlexibleWork #Microsoft #MicrosoftLife
___
Description: A view that goes into an espresso shot and out of a mug with foam and drizzle in front of a coffee shop on a Microsoft campus.

node.text: Introducing Hardwear, a function-first collection designed by Gavin Mathieu for Microsoft. Available now. Link in bio.
Made for today but inspired by yesterday. Shop our new Hardwear collection designed by Gavin Mathieu for Microsoft to inspire the creator in all of us. Available now, link in bio.
Fluid, fly, and functional. Peep the grid 👀
Hardwear isn't a vibe, it's an energy.

If you guessed shorts, you’re correct. If you guessed pants, you’re also correct.

node.text:
Happy #Pride! 
LGBTQIA+ communities at Microsoft are illuminating the interconnected nature of the challenges we face – and calling for a unified global response across all borders, both real and perceived. Check out our Story for more.
*wipes tear*

As the first all-Black team to summit, @fullcircleeverest brought representation to the highest place on earth – Mount Everest. Congratulations to the team, we’re proud to have been their technology partner. Photo Credit @pemba_sharwa
📍 Toronto, Ontario, Canada
Meet the first all-Black group of climbers attempting to summit Everest with help from Microsoft tech. Check out our Story for more. Photo credit: @thegreenevan
Hybrid work ✨ 🌲
Bouncing cards, such a vibe. ♠️♥️♣️♦️
Dark Mode PowerPoint – PowerPoint – PowerPoint.
Swipe to open the cabin office.
Core memory 😢

This Microsoft Paint art is a breath of fresh air. 🌲 
Courtesy of Twitter artist @ somartist.
📍 Atlanta, GA
I’m just here to brighten your feed. 🐱🎮
